name: SET PSI Validation Data Catalog
description: Complete catalog of all data artifacts in the PSI (Pressure-Signal Index) validation pipeline for the Stock Exchange of Thailand.

dataset.name: PSI Predictions
dataset.description: Pre-ATO regime forecast snapshots containing predicted regime and PSI score.

dataset.name: Market Outcomes
dataset.description: Observed ATO/ATC intraday market data including price, return, and volatility.

dataset.name: Validation Evaluations
dataset.description: Prediction vs outcome comparison records with accuracy flags and deviation scores.
dataset.measurementTechnique: Regime comparison against deterministic derivation rules defined in docs/research_reports/001-actual-regime-derivation-logic-v01.md.

dataset.name: Aggregated Metrics
dataset.description: Rolling accuracy, F1, precision, recall, and confusion matrix data.
